credentials.description: AWS access key ID — must have permissions to create S3, IAM, and CloudTrail resources

attack_env_vars.description: Passphrase for Pulumi stack encryption — must match the value used during pulumi up
attack_env_vars.how_to_get: Set any secure passphrase before running pulumi up; reuse the same value here

attack_env_vars.description: Victim IAM access key ID — normally resolved automatically from pulumi stack output; set as fallback if stack outputs are unavailable
Victim IAM secret access key — normally resolved automatically from pulumi stack output
